profile.name: Varun Singla
profile.subtitle: Daily AI breakthroughs, insights & trends — tracked one day at a time.

learnings.title: MCP Deep Dive, Nvidia GTC 2026 & OpenAI Superapp

viral_app.name: OpenAI Superapp
viral_app.description: ChatGPT + Codex + Atlas merged — first major consumer AI product designed natively around agentic workflows

topics: MCP Deep Dive: Full architecture breakdown — Host → Client → Server, three primitives (Tools, Resources, Prompts), JSON-RPC 2.0 transport
MCP 2026 Roadmap: Transport scalability via stateless Streamable HTTP, enterprise readiness (audit trails, SSO, gateway standards), governance maturation
MCP Growing Pains: Perplexity moving away from MCP citing context window consumption and auth issues
Nvidia GTC 2026: Agent Toolkit launched — NemoClaw + AI-Q + Nemotron, open-source agent platform, Nemotron Coalition (Cursor, Mistral, Perplexity, Adobe, SAP, Salesforce)
OpenAI Superapp: Merging ChatGPT + Codex + Atlas browser into unified agentic desktop app, led by Fidji Simo
Model Releases: Google Gemini 3.1 Pro (doubles ARC-AGI-2), GPT-5.3 'Garlic', Alibaba Qwen 3.5 (2hr video analysis), Nemotron 3 Super 120B
Amazon Health AI Agent (Prime integration), Snowflake × OpenAI $200M partnership, Fingerprint MCP Server for fraud prevention
key_stats: 40% enterprise apps with AI agents by EOY 2026 (Gartner)
AI-Q cuts research query costs by 50%
learnings.tomorrow_preview: Agent-to-Agent (A2A) Protocol — Google's standard for inter-agent communication and how it complements MCP

learnings.title: 7 Agentic AI Breakthroughs & The OpenClaw Acquisition

viral_app.name: OpenClaw
viral_app.description: Fastest-growing open-source project ever — 210K+ GitHub stars, acquired by OpenAI in February 2026

topics: 7 Agentic AI breakthroughs reshaping March 2026: autonomous workflows, cognitive density, multimodal consolidation, physical AI/robotics, inference cost collapse, real-time video generation, security-first enterprise coding
Alibaba Wukong: Enterprise agentic AI platform launched March 17
Nvidia NemoClaw & Kyber architecture unveiled at GTC 2026 (March 20)
Vibe coding trend: Codex app at 2M weekly active users — Claude Code, Replit, Lovable all racing to ship
Agentic AI Foundation (Linux Foundation): Standardising MCP, AGENTS.md, and the Goose framework
MCP ecosystem milestone: 10,000+ published MCP servers — A2A Protocol introduced as next layer
